functions.name: UpdateAllViewVisibility
functions.description: Updates the visibility for all actors for all views.

functions.name: UpdateAllActorsVisibility
functions.description: Updates the visibility of all actors in the viewports

functions.name: UpdateActorVisibility
functions.description: Updates the provided actors visibility in the viewports

functions.name: UpdateActorAllViewsVisibility
functions.description: Updates per-view visibility for the given actor for all views

functions.name: TryGetLayer
functions.description: Attempts to get the ULayer Object of the provided layer name.

functions.name: ToggleLayerVisibility
functions.description: Toggles the named layer's visibility

functions.name: ToggleLayersVisibility
functions.description: Toggles the visibility of all of the named layers

functions.name: SetLayerVisibility
functions.description: Changes the named layer's visibility to the provided state

functions.name: SetLayersVisibility
functions.description: Changes visibility of the named layers to the provided state

functions.name: SelectActorsInLayers
functions.description: Selects/de-selects actors belonging to the named layers.

functions.name: SelectActorsInLayer
functions.description: Selects/de-selects actors belonging to the named layer.

functions.name: RenameLayer
functions.description: Renames the provided originally named layer to the provided new name

functions.name: RemoveSelectedActorsFromLayers
functions.description: Removes selected actors from the named layers.

functions.name: RemoveSelectedActorsFromLayer
functions.description: Removes the selected actors from the named layer.

functions.name: RemoveLevelLayerInformation
functions.description: Purges any information regarding layers associated with the level and it contents

functions.name: RemoveActorsFromLayers
functions.description: Remove the actors to the named layers

functions.name: RemoveActorsFromLayer
functions.description: Removes the actors from the specified layer.

functions.name: RemoveActorFromLayers
functions.description: Removes the provided actor from the named layers.

functions.name: RemoveActorFromLayer
functions.description: Removes an actor from the specified layer.

functions.name: MakeAllLayersVisible
functions.description: Set the visibility of all layers to true

functions.name: IsLayer
functions.description: Checks whether the ULayer Object of the provided layer name exists.

functions.name: IsActorValidForLayer
functions.description: Checks to see if the specified actor is in an appropriate state to interact with layers

functions.name: InitializeNewActorLayers
functions.description: Synchronizes an newly created Actor's layers with the layer system

functions.name: GetWorld
functions.description: Get the current UWorld object.

functions.name: GetSelectedActors
functions.description: Find and return the selected actors.

functions.name: GetLayer
functions.description: Gets the ULayer Object of the named layer

functions.name: GetActorsFromLayers
functions.description: Gets all the actors associated with ANY of the specified layers. Analog to AppendActorsFromLayers but it returns rather than appends the actors.

functions.name: GetActorsFromLayer
functions.description: Gets all the actors associated with the specified layer. Analog to AppendActorsFromLayer but it returns rather than appends the actors.

functions.name: EditorRefreshLayerBrowser
functions.description: Delegate handler for FEditorDelegates::RefreshLayerBrowser. It internally calls UpdateAllActorsVisibility to refresh the actors of each layer.

functions.name: EditorMapChange
functions.description: Delegate handler for FEditorDelegates::MapChange. It internally calls LayersChanged.Broadcast.

functions.name: DisassociateActorsFromLayers
functions.description: Disassociates actors from the layer system, generally used before deleting the Actors

functions.name: DisassociateActorFromLayers
functions.description: Disassociates an Actor's layers from the layer system, general used before deleting the Actor

functions.name: DeleteLayers
functions.description: Deletes all of the provided layers, disassociating all actors from them

functions.name: DeleteLayer
functions.description: Deletes the provided layer, disassociating all actors from them

functions.name: CreateLayer
functions.description: Creates a ULayer Object for the named layer

functions.name: AppendActorsFromLayers
functions.description: Appends all the actors associated with ANY of the specified layers.

functions.name: AppendActorsFromLayer
functions.description: Appends all the actors associated with the specified layer.

functions.name: AddSelectedActorsToLayers
functions.description: Adds selected actors to the named layers.

functions.name: AddSelectedActorsToLayer
functions.description: Adds selected actors to the named layer.

functions.name: AddLevelLayerInformation
functions.description: Aggregates any information regarding layers associated with the level and it contents

functions.name: AddAllLayersTo
functions.description: Gets all known layers and appends them to the provided array

functions.name: AddAllLayerNamesTo
functions.description: Gets all known layers and appends their names to the provide array

functions.name: AddActorToLayers
functions.description: Adds the provided actor to the named layers.

functions.name: AddActorToLayer
functions.description: Adds the actor to the named layer.

functions.name: AddActorsToLayers
functions.description: Add the actors to the named layers

functions.name: AddActorsToLayer
functions.description: Add the actors to the named layer
